projects.name: Portfolio Shell
projects.headline: System exists. First product shipped. The path begins.
worked_well: PMD system held structure across all 9 phases without breaking down
WCAG 2.2 AA delivered non-negotiably — no deferred accessibility
Session summaries enabled clean context handoff every session
tricky: Sketch image positioning required many iteration cycles
Responsive CSS took longer than estimated
proud_of: Shipped a live URL — thepmdev.com — from a standing start
16 approved artifacts across 9 phases — complete product cycle
exceeded_expectations: PMD SKILL.md created — system now self-documenting and portable
fell_short: Draft-first protocol not active at P0 — coach led rather than user
projects.showcase_rationale: Demonstrates complete 9-phase process and live deployment.
content_log_items: P0 launch build log — X.com pinned post
projects.next_project_intent: P1 — TBD after six system additions complete
